title: Don't miss free wellness expo
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The first Iconic Wellness...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The first Iconic Wellness Expo Mossel Bay will be held on Saturday, 23 March, in the town hall.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The first Iconic Wellness Expo Mossel Bay will be held on Saturday, 23 March, in the town hall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event is free to attend. Stallholders/vendors pay a fee. There will be speakers, products to buy and workshops.","html":"The event is free to attend. Stallholders/vendors pay a fee. There will be speakers, products to buy and workshops."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Proceeds from the stallholders/vendors will go to three charities in the Mossel Bay area: the SPCA, Creating Effective Families (CEF) and The Haven night shelter.","html":"Proceeds from the stallholders/vendors will go to three charities in the Mossel Bay area: the SPCA, Creating Effective Families (CEF) and The Haven night shelter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There will also be a raffle to raise money for the charities.","html":"There will also be a raffle to raise money for the charities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Speakers","html":"Speakers"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The expo takes place from 09:00 to 15:00. There are 10 speakers, giving their presentations in half hour slots each, from 09:00 to 15:00.","html":"The expo takes place from 09:00 to 15:00. There are 10 speakers, giving their presentations in half hour slots each, from 09:00 to 15:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The speakers include a writer, nutritionists, health coaches, yoga instructor, energy/balance experts and experts in natural healing techniques and plant remedies.","html":"The speakers include a writer, nutritionists, health coaches, yoga instructor, energy/balance experts and experts in natural healing techniques and plant remedies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The expo will embrace a holistic approach to wellness, encompassing spirit, soul and body.","html":"The expo will embrace a holistic approach to wellness, encompassing spirit, soul and body."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vendors","html":"Vendors"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The benefits of participating as a vendor are:- Direct access to a targeted audience seeking health and wellness solutions.- Networking opportunities with industry professionals and like-minded individuals.- Increased visibility and brand exposure.- Opportunity to generate leads and acquire new customers.- Opportunity to launch new products or services.","html":"The benefits of participating as a vendor are:

- Direct access to a targeted audience seeking health and wellness solutions.
- Networking opportunities with industry professionals and like-minded individuals.
- Increased visibility and brand exposure.
- Opportunity to generate leads and acquire new customers.
- Opportunity to launch new products or services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The vendor's fee of R350 includes a 3mx3m stall space as well as two chairs and one table if so required.","html":"The vendor's fee of R350 includes a 3mx3m stall space as well as two chairs and one table if so required."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Prize for best stall","html":"Prize for best stall"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Space is limited and registrations will be processed on a first-come, first-served basis. The organisers say: \"A prize for best stall appearance will be presented at the end of the day, so we encourage vendors to take special care with your stall set-up.\"","html":"Space is limited and registrations will be processed on a first-come, first-served basis. The organisers say: \"A prize for best stall appearance will be presented at the end of the day, so we encourage vendors to take special care with your stall set-up.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, contact Hermien (076 643 2014) or Elsa (072 883 8087). Also see: Iconic_wellness_mosselbay on Instagram and Iconic-Wellness-Expo-Mosselbay on Facebook.","html":"For more information, contact Hermien (076 643 2014) or Elsa (072 883 8087). Also see: Iconic_wellness_mosselbay on Instagram and Iconic-Wellness-Expo-Mosselbay on Facebook."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
